_meta.source: unite-db.com/pokemon.json (Mathcord-sourced; the data its site uses)
_meta.validated: Pikachu Thunder Shock matches the reference engine; move totals cross-checked vs Game8
_meta.formula: component dmg = (base + slider*(level-1) + ratio*stat) * hits, then *600/(600+def[-pen])
_meta.coverage: passive + basic + base moves + Lv5/7 upgrades (+ enhanced Lv11/13 forms) + Unite move
